nasb.text: So he said to Jether his firstborn, “Rise, kill them.” But the youth did not draw his sword, for he was afraid, because he was still a youth.

esv.text: So he said to Jether his firstborn, “Rise and kill them!” But the young man did not draw his sword, for he was afraid, because he was still a young man.

cnv.text: 於是對他的長子益帖說：“起來，把他們殺了吧。”但是那孩子不敢拔刀，只是害怕，因為他還是個孩子。

ccb.text: 于是，基甸对长子益帖说：“你杀死他们。”但益帖年纪小，心中害怕，不敢动手。
